title: anthoxanthum horsfieldii var. formosanum
intro: Anthoxanthum horsfieldii var. formosanum, also known as Taiwan oat grass, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and promoting digestive health. Herbal preparations of Taiwan oat grass often include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be consumed as teas, capsules, or added to foods.
